---
title: "supplment_structure"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



new order of reportes test statstics
Lead: the order follow  structure of the overview figuers/

## parametric tests Students t.test and Fisher aov (Route 1 only )
Lead normality, homoscedacity tests passed in main numeric/categorical testing branch 
### student k=2
### Fisher k>2 

 Connection: for k=2 t2=F
 this was much better in older versions -> look up
 
 
## non parametric tests: wilcox and Kruskal wallis (Route 1 and 2 )
 
 
 
### kruskal  

Show that here no equalit fro k=2 to  kruskal is given, only aparoximative. see older vignette 

## pearson x^2 and Fihser exact test ( Route 4) 



.... rest stays  . 

Until Rank association measures 

Lead belonging to route 2 kedall or route 3 (spearmann)
